name: Tri-Brigade Hammer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉄獣の撃鉄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トライブリゲード・ハンマー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Tri-Brigade Hammer" once per turn);
● Add 1 "Tri-Brigade" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Tri-Brigade Hammer".
● Banish any number of "Tri-Brigade" cards from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Tri-Brigade" Link Monster from your Extra Deck with Link Rating equal to the number banished, ignoring its Summoning conditions, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except Beast, Beast-Warrior, or Winged Beast monsters.

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
